pre_capture_js: document.querySelectorAll('[data-floorplan-name]').forEach(el => { const name = el.getAttribute('data-floorplan-name'); const sqft = el.getAttribute('data-floorplan-sqft'); const price = el.getAttribute('data-floorplan-price'); if (name && sqft) { const div = document.createElement('div'); div.textContent = '[PLAN DATA] ' + name + ' | Sqft: ' + sqft + ' | Price: ' + price; div.style.fontSize = '14px'; el.parentElement.insertBefore(div, el); } });
